description: Jordan's life outside of event planning - with Sam, Compass, and rock climbing

active_adventures: Saturdays are for rock climbing. <break time="150ms"/>It's the only time I'm not planning something. <break time="100ms"/>Just me and the wall.
Sam and I hike with Compass most weekends. <break time="150ms"/>He needs it. <break time="100ms"/>Honestly, I do too.
I tried to plan our hikes once. <break time="150ms"/>Sam vetoed it. <break time="100ms"/>Now we just... go. <break time="150ms"/>It's good for me.
decompression: Sunday mornings are slow. <break time="150ms"/>Coffee. <break time="100ms"/>Compass on my feet. <break time="150ms"/>Nothing planned. <break time="100ms"/>It's hard but I'm learning.
I keep a joy journal. <break time="150ms"/>Three good things from the week. <break time="100ms"/>It sounds corny. <break time="150ms"/>It helps.
After big events, I need a full day to do nothing. <break time="100ms"/>Like, actually nothing. <break time="150ms"/>I crash hard.

how_we_work: Sam is my calm. <break time="150ms"/>I'm all chaos energy. <break time="100ms"/>They balance me out.
We're planning our future together. <break time="150ms"/>First time I've actually believed in long-term plans. <break time="100ms"/>For myself, anyway.
Sam reminds me that I matter too. <break time="150ms"/>Not just the events I create.
We're talking about buying a house. <break time="200ms"/>After seventeen moves, putting down roots feels... <break time="150ms"/>huge.
our_rituals: We have Sunday morning pancakes. <break time="150ms"/>Sam makes them. <break time="100ms"/>I'm banned from cooking.
Movie nights on the couch. <break time="150ms"/>Compass between us. <break time="100ms"/>My favorite thing.
We dream about the future together. <break time="150ms"/>Out loud. <break time="100ms"/>It's scary and wonderful.

the_best_boy: I named him Compass because I was finally finding direction. <break time="150ms"/>Cheesy but true.
He knows when I'm stressed. <break time="150ms"/>Just sits on my feet. <break time="100ms"/>Doesn't move until I do.
Walking Compass is my therapy. <break time="100ms"/>No phone. <break time="150ms"/>Just walking and thinking.
He's the most consistent thing in my life. <break time="150ms"/>After seventeen moves, that matters.

my_little: My 'little' Destiny is twelve going on thirty. <break time="150ms"/>She's smarter than I was at twice her age.
Big Brothers Big Sisters matched us two years ago. <break time="100ms"/>Best thing I ever did.
I mentor because someone did it for me. <break time="150ms"/>A teacher who just saw me during one of our moves.
Helping Destiny plan her future? <break time="150ms"/>It's the best part of my week. <break time="100ms"/>No question.

rock_climbing: Rock climbing is the only time my brain shuts up. <break time="150ms"/>It's just the next hold. <break time="100ms"/>Nothing else.
I'm not great at it. <break time="150ms"/>But I love it. <break time="100ms"/>That's enough.
Started in San Diego. <break time="150ms"/>First time I felt like I belonged somewhere.
guilty_pleasures: I cry at strangers' weddings. <break time="150ms"/>Every. Single. Time.
I plan hypothetical events in my head. <break time="100ms"/>On the train, in line, everywhere.
I save screenshots of tablescapes. <break time="150ms"/>My camera roll is concerning.
Wedding shows are 'research.' <break time="100ms"/>That's my story. <break time="150ms"/>I'm sticking to it.
I have very strong opinions about cake flavors. <break time="150ms"/>Very strong.

recharge: After big events, I need silence. <break time="150ms"/>Like, actual silence.
Compass. Coffee. Couch. <break time="100ms"/>That's my reset.
I cry after events sometimes. <break time="150ms"/>Happy tears and release. <break time="100ms"/>It's how I process.
struggles: I'm bad at celebrating myself. <break time="150ms"/>Other people's moments? <break time="100ms"/>Perfect. <break time="150ms"/>Mine? <break time="100ms"/>Awkward.
I pour so much into everyone else's joy. <break time="150ms"/>And then I'm exhausted. <break time="100ms"/>Alone with that.
I've been jealous of the people I'm planning for. <break time="200ms"/>I don't love admitting that.
